rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §31.0752, which governs the Open Education Resource Instructional Material Support Program. No overlapping provisions exist.
quote: The agency shall develop and maintain a program to assist school districts and open-enrollment charter schools in adopting and using open education resource instructional material made available under this subchapter
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns instructional materials and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
